validation_rules: Non-empty; INN or USAN preferred name; max 200 chars; must match WHO INN List entry
Non-empty; must include site name and country code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2); max 300 chars
Non-empty; must list all components with quantities and units; JSON or structured text; max 2000 chars
Non-empty; must include parameter name with numeric upper and lower bounds and units; format: param|lower|upper|unit
Non-empty; must include condition (e.g. 25C/60%RH) and time points in months; CSV-structured within field
Non-empty; physical form and appearance; max 500 chars; must include colour and physical state
Non-empty; must specify material type and component description; max 500 chars; must reference DMF if applicable
Non-empty; must describe key synthesis or formulation steps; max 5000 chars; must include critical process parameters
Reference to validated analytical procedure; must include method ID and validation status; max 200 chars
List of identified and unidentified impurities with acceptance criteria; format: impurity_name|limit_pct|qualified
